library_preparation_preflight.summary: io.circe:circe-generic_3:0.15.0-M1 is a pure Scala generic JSON codec derivation artifact. Its POM depends only on circe-core_3 and scala3-library_3, and circe-core brings its normal transitive dependencies. Meaningful coverage is reachable by deriving encoders/decoders for case classes, sealed traits, and Scala 3 enums and exercising them with io.circe.Json and io.circe.syntax APIs; no service, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is required.
risks: circe-parser is a separate optional module needed only if generated tests parse raw JSON strings with io.circe.parser; generic derivation coverage can avoid it by constructing Json values directly.
The reported failure is an API/source compatibility issue in the existing test code, not missing external setup.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8301 [Automation] java run fails for io.circe:circe-generic_3:0.15.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015
